title: Core Ethical Concepts for AI Public Policy
description: A diagram showing the foundational ethical pillars from Book 1 and their connection to the subsequent modules on public policy.
elements: Foundational Ethical Theories (Deontology, Utilitarianism, Virtue Ethics)
Core AI Principles (Fairness, Accountability, Transparency, Privacy)
relationships: Foundational theories inform the development of core AI principles
Core principles must align with societal values and human rights
Stakeholders are responsible for implementing principles into policy
